mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, m.movie_name, col.personal_rating as current_rating FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id LEFT JOIN movie_collection col ON col.user_id = c.user_id AND col.movie_id = c.movie_id WHERE c.movie_id = #{movieId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
SELECT comment_id, movie_id, user_id, content, like_count, reply_to, is_edited, create_time, update_time FROM movie_comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movie_comment (movie_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE movie_comment SET content = #{content}, is_edited = TRUE, update_time = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id, c.movie_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.reply_to, c.is_edited, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.movie_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.reply_to, c.is_edited, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE m.tmdb_id = #{tmdbId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.comment_id, c.movie_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.like_count, c.reply_to, c.is_edited, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.username, m.movie_name FROM movie_comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id JOIN movie_public m ON c.movie_id = m.movie_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.movie_id = #{movieId} LIMIT 1
